Plot stat rating profile as bar chart or radar

Source: R/plot_player.R
plot_stat_rating_profile.Rd

Visualizes a player's stat rating percentile ranks grouped by category.

Usage

plot_stat_rating_profile(
  x,
  type = c("bar", "radar"),
  categories = NULL,
  top_n = 15,
  comparison = c("position", "league")
)

Arguments

x

A torp_stat_rating_profile object from player_stat_rating_profile().

type

One of "bar" (default) or "radar".

categories

Optional character vector of categories to include (e.g. c("scoring", "disposal")). NULL for all.

top_n

For bar chart, number of stats to show (sorted by percentile). Default 15. Use NULL for all.

comparison

One of "position" (default, uses pos_pct) or "league" (uses league_pct).

Value

A ggplot2 object.
